jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Ipca Laboratories
jsonLd.description:
Ipca Laboratories has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Chennai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Ipca Laboratories:
Ipca Laboratories is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Coding

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ipca Laboratories!
